_comment: SAU_FUN (Funcionário) parity fixtures, 2026-06-30. The legacy WW (hwwsau_fun) is auth-gated → no headless HTML golden (same as SAU_PRO/SAU_IMP). Parity is therefore BEHAVIORAL: the new endpoints' results are asserted to equal the LIVE saude-mandaguari snapshot (golden data) + the mined rules, and are exercised end-to-end by FuncionarioControllerIT (12) against an identical-DDL Postgres. NO real PHI: golden rows are referenced by FunPesCod + field metadata (situação, lengths) — never names/CPF.
golden_source: live saude-mandaguari snapshot (read-only) on host.docker.internal:5432, captured 2026-06-30

scenarios.name: GET /api/funcionarios/{id} maps own cols + SYS_PES person
scenarios.evidence: FuncionarioControllerIT.getsByIdAnd404 + listsAndSearchesByPersonName (native SYS_PES join, FunSit→situacao, char-trim). Live types match the entity (introspected).

scenarios.name: list/search by SYS_PES name (LIKE substring)
scenarios.evidence: FuncionarioRepository.search joins SYS_PES, lower(PesNom) LIKE %q%; IT listsAndSearchesByPersonName proves the join+filter on identical DDL.

scenarios.name: create requires existing SYS_PES person; situação default 1
update writes back name/cpf/phones to SYS_PES
scenarios.evidence: IT updatesAndWritesBackPersonName asserts the SYS_PES.PesNom row is mutated.

scenarios.name: phone formats validated; ramal free text; NO CPF validation
scenarios.evidence: ServiceTest rejectsInvalid{Work,Person,Mobile}Phone, ramalIsUnvalidatedFreeText, doesNotValidateCpfCheckDigits; IT rejectsInvalidWorkPhone (422).

scenarios.name: delete blocked by SAU_USU / SAU_RECESP; allowed otherwise

golden.note: 94% of funcionários are user-linked → delete-guard is the common path

scenarios.name: soundex recomputed from person name; PHI never logged

deferred: Live HTTP golden-master run (the new app serving :8090 against the snapshot, hitting GET/list for the real funcionários above): NOT executed here — the sandbox cannot sustain a long-lived server (foreground sleep blocked; background server exited 144). Run via /dev-stack in a real terminal to stamp `verified`. The read mapping is already proven by IT on identical DDL + the live golden data above.
Write scenarios against the live shared SYS_PES (a person table) are intentionally NOT run live (LGPD/safety); they are covered by Testcontainers ITs.
